summary: This measures how long it takes DOF to decide a parking summons hearing filed online. DOF's management reports tie fluctuations here to the same forces affecting all parking hearing types in this period: a growing volume of hearings combined with an ongoing shortage of administrative law judges, which the agency has been working to address through recruitment.

sources.label: NYC Department of Finance, Fiscal 2024 Mayor's Management Report
NYC Department of Finance, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing, driven by rising hearing volume and a shortage of judges
